---
title: 'Car Faith Project: God''s Turn'
date: '2014-07-05T07:22:00.0040000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3800151268340470875'
blogger_filename: '/2014/07/car-faith-project-gods-turn.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Project'
  - 'Journal'
---

Father,<br />
<br />
You love me. You love me as much as you do Jesus. You want to provide for me more than I want you to provide for me. I've had a lousy track record with faith. So here's the plan. You buy the car for me. You tell me what car it is, pay for it, lead me to it/or lead it to me. I roll this care over into your hands.<br />
<br />
Darrell 2:22 am CT 07/05/14<br />
<br />
________________________________________________<br />
Update:<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
________________________________________________<br />
Update:<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
________________________________________________<br />
Final Outcome:<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
